   Buffers: shared hit=549
   ->  Seq Scan on public.memo_items i  (cost=0.00..1541.00 rows=100000 width=12) (actual time=0.003..20.072 rows=100000 loops=1)
         Buffers: shared hit=541
   ->  Memoize  (cost=0.15..0.17 rows=1 width=7) (actual time=0.000..0.000 rows=0 loops=100000)
         Cache Key: i.cat
         Cache Mode: logical
         Hits: 99950  Misses: 50  Evictions: 0  Overflows: 0  Memory Usage: 4kB
         Buffers: shared hit=8
         ->  Index Scan using memo_cats_pkey on public.memo_cats c  (cost=0.14..0.16 rows=1 width=7) (actual time=0.000..0.000 rows=0 loops=50)
               Index Cond: ((c.id = i.cat) AND (c.id < 5))
               Buffers: shared hit=8
Settings: enable_hashjoin = 'off', enable_mergejoin = 'off'

--- stats ---

  - planning: 0.686 ms
  - execution: 33.631 ms
